name: Booking a studio reaches the confirmation pass with a reference
description: A signed-in member opens a studio, selects an open slot on the availability light board, continues to review to place a hold, confirms it, and sees a booking confirmation (the ivory pass) showing a reference code that starts with ATL-.

planSteps.description: Open the sign in page from the header
Enter the email member@atelier.test into the email field
Enter the password MemberPass#2026 into the password field
Open the first studio in the gallery
On the availability light board, click the first open time slot to select it
Click the 'Continue to review' button to place the hold
Click the 'Confirm booking' button on the review panel
Verify the text 'Booking confirmed' and a reference code starting with 'ATL-' are both visible
